tools.name: browse_movies
tools.description: Browse the movie collection with filters for genre, decade, director, and year. Supports sorting, pagination, and returns top-N posters.

sort.description: Optional: sort by field (default: watched_at). Options: watched_at, title, year, rating

include_images.description: Include artwork/poster image content blocks in the response. Default true. Set false to keep responses small.

tools.name: find_similar_articles
tools.description: Find articles thematically similar to a given article by cosine similarity over Voyage AI embeddings. Use after an article has been surfaced (via search, get_recent_reads, or an @rewind://article/{id} mention) when the user asks "what else was I reading like that" or "show me related pieces". No Voyage API call is made — the article's stored vector is reused.

article_id.description: Internal Rewind article id (from an earlier search/recent result)

limit.description: Number of related articles to return

tools.name: get_activity_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific running activity by ID, including distance, pace, heart rate, elevation, calories, and a Strava resource link.

tools.name: get_activity_splits
tools.description: Get per-mile splits for a running activity. Shows pace, elevation, and heart rate for each mile. Get the activity ID from get_recent_runs.

tools.name: get_album_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific album by ID: artist, play count, track listing, cover art, and Apple Music link.

include_images.description: Include artwork/poster image content blocks in the response. Default true. Set false to keep responses small.

tools.name: get_artist_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific artist by ID: play count, top albums, top tracks, artist image, and Apple Music link.

include_images.description: Include artwork/poster image content blocks in the response. Default true. Set false to keep responses small.

tools.name: get_collecting_stats
tools.description: Get overall collection statistics including total items, format breakdown (vinyl, CD, cassette), unique artists, genre data, and year range. Supports date filtering.

date.description: Optional: filter to a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD)

tools.name: get_feed
tools.description: Get the unified activity feed across all domains. Returns a chronological list of recent activities (listens, runs, watches, reads, collection adds). Supports date filtering.

limit.description: Number of feed items to return

domain.description: Optional: filter feed to a single domain

date.description: Optional: filter to a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD)

tools.name: get_health
tools.description: Check the health and sync status of the Rewind API. Returns API status and last sync times for each data domain.

tools.name: get_listening_genres
tools.description: Get genre breakdown over time from Last.fm listening history, grouped by week/month/year. Designed for stacked chart visualization.

limit.description: Max genres to return -- rest grouped as "Other" (default 10)

date.description: Optional: filter to a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD)

tools.name: get_listening_stats
tools.description: Get overall listening statistics from Last.fm including total scrobbles, unique artists, albums, tracks, and daily average. Supports date filtering.

date.description: Optional: filter to a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD)

tools.name: get_listening_streaks
tools.description: Get listening streak data from Last.fm -- current consecutive days with scrobbles and the longest streak ever.

tools.name: get_movie_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific movie by ID, including director, genres, rating, summary, watch history, poster image, and Letterboxd review links for rated watches.

include_images.description: Include artwork/poster image content blocks in the response. Default true. Set false to keep responses small.

tools.name: get_now_playing
tools.description: Get the track currently playing (or most recently scrobbled) on Last.fm. Returns track + artist + album, album cover image, and Apple Music resource link.

include_images.description: Include artwork/poster image content blocks in the response. Default true. Set false to keep responses small.

tools.name: get_on_this_day
tools.description: Get historical 'on this day' items -- what happened on a given date in previous years across all domains. Defaults to today. Great for nostalgia and reflection.

month.description: Optional: month (1-12). Defaults to current month.

day.description: Optional: day (1-31). Defaults to current day.

tools.name: get_personal_records
tools.description: Get personal running records (PRs) from Strava -- fastest times at standard distances like mile, 5K, 10K, half marathon, marathon.

tools.name: get_physical_media
tools.description: Browse the physical media collection (Blu-ray, 4K UHD, HD DVD). Search by title, filter by format. Returns top-N cover art and pagination.

media_type.description: Optional: filter by format (bluray, uhd_bluray, hddvd)

include_images.description: Include artwork/poster image content blocks in the response. Default true. Set false to keep responses small.

tools.name: get_physical_media_stats
tools.description: Get statistics for the physical media collection including total items and breakdown by format (Blu-ray, 4K UHD, HD DVD).

tools.name: get_random_highlight
tools.description: Get a single random highlight from saved Instapaper articles. Great for daily inspiration or reflection.

tools.name: get_reading_highlights
tools.description: Get saved highlights from Instapaper articles. Returns the highlighted text, notes, source article, and article URLs as resource links.

tools.name: get_reading_stats
tools.description: Get overall reading statistics from Instapaper including total articles, finished count, currently reading, highlights, and word count.

tools.name: get_recent_listens
tools.description: Get recently scrobbled tracks from Last.fm, with top-N album covers and Apple Music resource links. Supports date filtering.

limit.description: Number of recent tracks to return (default 10, max 50)

page.description: Page number for pagination. Combine with limit to page through longer windows.

date.description: Optional: filter to a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD)

include_images.description: Include artwork/poster image content blocks in the response. Default true. Set false to keep responses small.

tools.name: get_recent_reads
tools.description: Get recently saved articles from Instapaper. Returns title, author, domain, read time, status, top-N site images where available, and article URLs as resource links.

limit.description: Number of recent articles to return (max 50)

page.description: Page number for pagination. Combine with limit to page through longer windows.

date.description: Optional: filter to a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD)

include_images.description: Include artwork/poster image content blocks in the response. Default true. Set false to keep responses small.

tools.name: get_recent_runs
tools.description: Get recent running activities from Strava. Returns runs with ID, distance, pace, duration, location, and Strava activity resource links for top-N.

limit.description: Number of recent runs to return (max 50)

page.description: Page number for pagination. Combine with limit to page through longer windows.

date.description: Optional: filter to a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD)

tools.name: get_recent_watches
tools.description: Get recently watched movies and TV shows from Plex and Letterboxd. Returns titles, ratings, watch dates, top-N posters, and Letterboxd review links where available. In MCP Apps hosts, renders an interactive poster grid inline.

limit.description: Number of recent watches to return (max 50)

page.description: Page number for pagination (1-indexed). Combine with limit to page through longer windows like "last month".

date.description: Optional: filter to a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD)

include_images.description: Include artwork/poster image content blocks in the response. Default true. Set false to keep responses small.

tools.name: get_running_stats
tools.description: Get overall running statistics from Strava including total runs, distance, elevation, duration, average pace, and Eddington number.

tools.name: get_running_streaks
tools.description: Get running streak data from Strava -- current consecutive days with runs and the longest streak ever.

tools.name: get_running_years
tools.description: Get per-year summary of running activity: total runs, distance, elevation, duration, average pace, longest run, and race count for every year on record.

tools.name: get_top_albums
tools.description: Get top listened-to albums from Last.fm for a given time period, with top-N covers and Apple Music links.

include_images.description: Include artwork/poster image content blocks in the response. Default true. Set false to keep responses small.

tools.name: get_top_artists
tools.description: Get top listened-to artists from Last.fm for a given time period, with top-N artist images and Apple Music links.

include_images.description: Include artwork/poster image content blocks in the response. Default true. Set false to keep responses small.

tools.name: get_top_tracks
tools.description: Get top listened-to tracks from Last.fm for a given time period, with top-N Apple Music links.

tools.name: get_vinyl_collection
tools.description: Browse the vinyl record collection from Discogs. Returns records with artist, title, year, format, and label, plus top-N cover art and Discogs resource links. Supports search, filters, sort, and pagination.

query.description: Optional: search by artist or album title (e.g. 'Beastie Boys', 'Dark Side')

sort.description: Optional: sort field (default: date_added). Options: date_added, title, year, artist

date.description: Optional: filter to a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD)

include_images.description: Include artwork/poster image content blocks in the response. Default true. Set false to keep responses small.

tools.name: get_watching_decades
tools.description: Get decade breakdown across all watched movies. Returns each decade with movie count.

tools.name: get_watching_directors
tools.description: Get top directors by watched-movie count. Returns directors ranked by how many of their films you have watched.

tools.name: get_watching_genres
tools.description: Get genre breakdown across all watched movies. Returns each genre with movie count and percentage of total watches.

tools.name: get_watching_stats
tools.description: Get overall watching statistics including total movies, watch time, movies this year, top genre, top director, TV show counts, and episode counts. Supports date filtering.

date.description: Optional: filter to a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD)

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search across all domains (listening, running, watching, collecting, reading). Three ranking modes: keyword (default) uses FTS5 full-text search across all domains; semantic uses Voyage AI embeddings for paraphrased / meaning-based recall (reading domain only); hybrid fuses both (reading domain only). Use semantic or hybrid when the user describes what an article was ABOUT rather than quoting its words.

domain.description: Optional: filter results to a single domain

mode.description: Ranking mode. keyword = FTS (default). semantic = cosine-similarity over article embeddings (reading only). hybrid = FTS + semantic via reciprocal rank fusion (reading only).

tools.name: semantic_search
tools.description: Semantic search over the reading domain using Voyage AI embeddings. Use when the user describes the gist or topic of an article they remember rather than quoting exact words — e.g. "article about a former SNL writer" or "piece about tech layoffs". Returns articles ranked by cosine similarity with a score in [0,1]. Reading domain only.

tools.name: ui_hello_debug
tools.description: Show the Rewind MCP Apps diagnostic UI. Invoke this to verify the MCP Apps pipeline end-to-end against a known-working minimal React app.

prompts.name: compare-periods
prompts.description: Compare activity between two time periods for a specific domain

arguments.name: domain
arguments.description: Domain to compare (listening, running, watching, collecting, reading)

prompts.name: film-diet
prompts.description: Characterize the shape of my movie-watching taste: genre mix, decade distribution, top directors, rewatch rate, and where I lean vs drift.

prompts.name: find-article
prompts.description: Recover an article the user only half-remembers, using hybrid keyword + semantic search, then surface related pieces

arguments.name: description
arguments.description: Whatever the user remembers about the article: topic, person mentioned, feeling, rough time period, etc.

prompts.name: letterboxd-review-draft
prompts.description: Draft a Letterboxd-style review for a recently watched film that I have rated but not yet reviewed.

arguments.name: title
arguments.description: Optional film title to review. If omitted, picks the most recent unreviewed watch.

prompts.name: training-report
prompts.description: Analyze the past 7-14 days of running activity and produce a coach-style training report.

prompts.name: weekly-summary
prompts.description: Generate a summary of activity across all domains for the past week

prompts.name: year-in-review
prompts.description: Generate a comprehensive year-in-review for a given year across all domains

resources.name: sync-status
resources.description: Current sync health and last sync times for each data domain

resources.name: Rewind -- Hello (debug)
resources.description: Minimal diagnostic UI. Mirror of the Phase-1 app that rendered cleanly earlier today.

resources.name: Rewind -- Recent Watches
resources.description: Interactive poster grid for recently watched movies. Consumes get_recent_watches structuredContent.

resourceTemplates.name: activity
resourceTemplates.description: Full detail for a single running activity by internal Rewind id: distance, pace, elevation, HR, cadence, calories, location, and Strava URL.

resourceTemplates.name: album
resourceTemplates.description: Full detail for a single album by internal Rewind id: artist, play count, track listing, cover art metadata, and Apple Music URL.

resourceTemplates.name: article
resourceTemplates.description: Full detail for a saved Instapaper article by internal Rewind id: title, author, domain, word count, read progress, tags, source URL, and embedded highlights.

resourceTemplates.name: artist
resourceTemplates.description: Full detail for a single artist by internal Rewind id: play count, genre, top albums, top tracks, image metadata, and Apple Music URL.

resourceTemplates.name: highlight
resourceTemplates.description: Full detail for a single Instapaper highlight by internal Rewind id: highlighted text, optional note, and nested parent-article context (title, author, domain, source URL).

resourceTemplates.name: listening-year
resourceTemplates.description: Listening year-in-review statistics for a given year

resourceTemplates.name: movie
resourceTemplates.description: Full detail for a single movie by internal Rewind id: metadata, watch history, ratings, and Letterboxd review URLs.

resourceTemplates.name: physical-media
resourceTemplates.description: Full detail for a single physical media item (Blu-ray / 4K UHD / HD DVD) by internal Rewind id: title, year, format, resolution, HDR, audio, watch history.

resourceTemplates.name: running-year
resourceTemplates.description: Running year-in-review statistics for a given year

resourceTemplates.name: show
resourceTemplates.description: Full detail for a single TV show by internal Rewind id: metadata, seasons, and watched-episode counts.

resourceTemplates.name: vinyl
resourceTemplates.description: Full detail for a single vinyl record (or other Discogs collection item) by internal Rewind id: title, artists, formats, genres, cover art, Discogs URL, community stats.

resourceTemplates.name: watching-year
resourceTemplates.description: Watching year-in-review statistics for a given year
